name: Tequila-Orange Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Vlasic hot pepper (remove seeds and finely chop)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a quart saucepan, combine the orange juice, tequila, chopped peppers, and orange peel.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until boiling.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes or until the mixture is reduced by half.
4. Stir in the chicken gravy and heat through, stirring constantly.
5. Grill the chicken breasts, skin side up, directly above medium coals on a grill rack.
6. Cook uncovered for 1 hour or until tender and juices run clear, turning and brushing with sauce during the last 30 minutes.
7. For broiling: Arrange the chicken, skin side up, on a rack in a broiler pan.
8. Broil 6 inches from heat for 40 minutes or until tender and juices run clear, turning and brushing often with sauce during the last 20 minutes.
